ddls:
CREATE TABLE "prisoners" (
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prisoner */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the prisoner */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the prisoner */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the prisoner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the prisoner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the prisoner */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the prisoner */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race or ethnicity of the prisoner */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level required for the prisoner */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the prisoner's photo */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the prisoner's family or lawyer */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Medical conditions of the prisoner */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the prisoner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the facility */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the facility */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the facility was opened */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility director */,
  "current_population" INTEGER /* Current number of prisoners in the facility */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custody_periods" (
  "custody_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custody period */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the prisoner is being held */,
  "in_custody" TEXT /* Date the prisoner was taken into custody */,
  "out_custody" TEXT /* Date the prisoner was released from custody */,
  "custody_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the custody */,
  "custody_status" TEXT /* Current status of the custody */,
  "custody_location" TEXT /* Specific location within the facility where the prisoner is held */,
  "custody_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member responsible for the custody period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("custody_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custody_periods_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custody_periods_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custody_periods_custody_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("custody_officer_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime */,
  "crime_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime */,
  "legal_code" TEXT /* Legal code or statute associated with the crime */,
  "penalty_range" TEXT /* Typical penalty range for the crime */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentences" (
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentence */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime */,
  "sentence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sentence in years */,
  "sentence_type" TEXT /* Type of sentence */,
  "sentence_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sentence */,
  "sentence_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sentence */,
  "parole_eligibility_date" TEXT /* Date the prisoner is eligible for parole */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge who sentenced the prisoner */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court where the sentence was handed down */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "from_facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the prisoner is being transferred from */,
  "to_facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the prisoner is being transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer */,
  "transfer_status" TEXT /* Status of the transfer */,
  "escorted_by" TEXT /* Name of the staff member who escorted the prisoner during the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the release */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Type of release */,
  "release_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the release */,
  "parole_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member responsible for the parole */,
  "next_court_date" TEXT /* Next court date for the released prisoner, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_parole_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("parole_officer_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the staff member is assigned to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the staff member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the staff member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was terminated, if applicable */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member's supervisor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "visitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the visitor */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit */,
  "visitor_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the visitor to the prisoner */,
  "visit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in minutes */,
  "visit_location" TEXT /* Location within the facility where the visit took place */,
  "staff_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who supervised the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_staff_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_member_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner involved */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location within the facility where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "staff_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who reported the incident */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of how the incident was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_staff_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_member_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)
